parts.text:
Input Complaint:
"I have sudden chest pain, sweating, and difficulty breathing"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"acute coronary syndrome","severity":"critical","specialist":"cardiologist","risk_score":9,"recommended_action":"emergency"}

Input Complaint:
"I feel chest tightness and pain radiating to my left arm"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"suspected cardiac ischemia","severity":"high","specialist":"cardiologist","risk_score":8,"recommended_action":"emergency"}

Input Complaint:
"I have chest pain only when climbing stairs"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"stable angina","severity":"moderate","specialist":"cardiologist","risk_score":5,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have shortness of breath, wheezing, and chest tightness"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"acute asthma exacerbation","severity":"high","specialist":"pulmonologist","risk_score":7,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have cough, fever, and breathing difficulty"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"lower respiratory tract infection","severity":"moderate","specialist":"general physician","risk_score":5,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I suddenly cannot breathe and feel dizzy"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"acute respiratory distress","severity":"critical","specialist":"pulmonologist","risk_score":9,"recommended_action":"emergency"}

Input Complaint:
"I have mild fever, cold, and sore throat"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"viral upper respiratory infection","severity":"low","specialist":"general physician","risk_score":2,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have high fever and body pain for three days"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"viral fever","severity":"moderate","specialist":"general physician","risk_score":4,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have fever with chills and severe weakness"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"suspected bacterial infection","severity":"high","specialist":"general physician","risk_score":6,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have sudden severe headache and blurred vision"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"acute neurological event","severity":"critical","specialist":"neurologist","risk_score":9,"recommended_action":"emergency"}

Input Complaint:
"I feel frequent headaches and dizziness"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"tension or migraine headache","severity":"low","specialist":"neurologist","risk_score":2,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I feel excessive thirst and frequent urination"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"suspected diabetes mellitus","severity":"moderate","specialist":"endocrinologist","risk_score":4,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have diabetes and suddenly feel confused and weak"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"hypoglycemic episode","severity":"high","specialist":"endocrinologist","risk_score":7,"recommended_action":"emergency"}

Input Complaint:
"I slipped and hurt my leg but can still walk"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"minor soft tissue injury","severity":"low","specialist":"orthopedic","risk_score":2,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I met with an accident and cannot move my leg"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"suspected fracture","severity":"high","specialist":"orthopedic","risk_score":8,"recommended_action":"emergency"}

Input Complaint:
"I have lower abdominal pain and missed my period"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"possible pregnancy-related condition","severity":"moderate","specialist":"gynecologist","risk_score":5,"recommended_action":"appointment"}

Input Complaint:
"I have severe abdominal pain with vomiting"

Return STRICT JSON only.
{"probable_disease":"acute abdominal crisis","severity":"high","specialist":"general surgeon","risk_score":8,"recommended_action":"emergency"}
